channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Apple, Microsoft hike prices over surging chip costs
item.description: Tech giants roll out steep price increases amid shortage of memory chips used to power AI.

item.title: Australia reach 2026 World Cup knockouts after 0-0 draw with Paraguay
item.description: The Socceroos finish second in Group D with four points and are through to the FIFA World Cup round of 32.

item.title: Egypt coach offers support for Iranian team before crucial World Cup match
item.description: Hossam Hassan invokes FIFA's 'respect and fair play' rules amid US restrictions on Iran, whom Egypt face in Seattle.

item.title: Satellite images show Venezuela’s La Guaira before and after twin quakes
item.description: Satellite images compare Venezuela's coastal city of La Guaira before and after twin earthquakes struck.

item.title: Forever wars: Israel’s cycle of conflict shows no finish line
item.description: Despite ceasefires and shifting military fronts, Israel’s wars continue, with no clear end or lasting security gains.

item.title: Oil prices climb after attack in Strait of Hormuz halts evacuation plan
item.description: Brent crude rises after cargo ship comes under attack in key waterway.

item.title: Marina Mabrey ties WNBA scoring record with 53 points; Tempo rout Sparks
item.description: Toronto's Mabrey matches A'ja Wilson and Liz Cambage for the league's scoring record in 125-97 win for her team.

item.title: Netherlands beat Tunisia 3-1, enter World Cup knockouts as group winners
item.description: Netherlands top Group F with seven points and will face Morocco in the round of 32 in Monterrey on Monday.

item.title: Hundreds trapped beneath buildings a day after Venezuela’s twin earthquakes
item.description: Emergency crews are racing to rescue hundreds trapped under collapsed buildings after earthquakes struck Venezuela.

item.title: Ivory Coast coach Fae saddened by Schweinsteiger’s ‘African football’ jab
item.description: Former German player's comments that 'African football' is ‘a bit unorthodox sometimes, a bit wild' sparked controversy.

item.title: Japan draw 1-1 with Sweden at World Cup to finish second in Group F
item.description: Goals from Daizen Maeda and Anthony Elanga were enough to see both teams through to the Round of 32.

item.title: France seizes fifth Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker linked to Ukraine war
item.description: France seizes fifth Russian ‘shadow fleet’ tanker linked to funding Ukraine war.

item.title: Who will control Africa’s AI infrastructure, and at what cost?
item.description: Data centres and AI systems are expanding across Africa, bringing new pressure on energy and resources.

item.title: Shia pilgrims gather in Iraq’s holy city of Karbala to mark Ashura
item.description: Shia Muslims gathered in the Iraqi city of Karbala to mark Ashura

item.title: Plan Intl: ‘Mental health impact of Venezuelan quakes can last for years’
item.description: Plan International said children and young people must be at the centre of Venezuela's earthquake response.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel attacks Lebanon as Netanyahu says troops to stay
item.description: Israeli leader says military to stay in occupied areas of southern Lebanon 'as long as necessary', despite US-Iran deal.

item.title: UN: Venezuela earthquakes will deepen already severe humanitarian crisis
item.description: The UN says it is scaling up its response after twin earthquakes devastated Venezuela.

item.title: India defeat Bangladesh to maintain Women’s T20 World Cup semifinal bid
item.description: Shafali Verma's half-century helps the 50-over world champions reach the target inside 17 overs at Old Trafford.

item.title: Pepe’s brace sends Ivory Coast to first knockouts as Curacao exit World Cup
item.description: The West Africans will face the second-place finisher between France and Norway in Group I on Tuesday in Texas.

item.title: Ecuador edge Germany 2-1 to squeeze into World Cup last 32
item.description: Germany finish top of Group E, with Ivory Coast second and Ecuador will have a chance of qualifying on third place.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live: Rescue efforts intensify as death toll hits 235
item.description: Residents are trapped beneath rubble of collapsed buildings after two major quakes hit Venezuela, killing at least 235.

item.title: WNBA: Alyssa Thomas suspended one game for fist into Cailtin Clark’s throat
item.description: Both players were on the floor when Thomas pushed her fist into Clark's throat before getting up and stepping over her.

item.title: Venezuela rescue teams race to find earthquake survivors
item.description: Rescue teams raced to find survivors and recover bodies after twin earthquakes rocked Venezuela on Wednesday.

item.title: Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
item.description: Initial forecasts suggest damage could cost as much as 7 percent of the South American nation's GDP.
